UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user profile information and preferences.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a conversation between two or more users.

id.description: The unique ID of the chat.

participants.description: The UIDs of the participants in the chat.

lastMessage.description: The content of the last message sent in the chat.

lastMessageTime.description: When the last message was sent.

unreadCounts.description: A map of user UIDs to their unread message count.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual message within a chat.

id.description: The unique ID of the message.

chatId.description: The ID of the chat this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

replyTo.description: Information about the message being replied to.

isEdited.description: Whether the message has been edited.

isRead.description: Whether the message has been read.

BlockedAccount.title: Blocked Account
BlockedAccount.description: Represents a blocked relationship between two users.

blockerId.description: The UID of the user who is blocking.

blockedId.description: The UID of the user who is being blocked.

blockedName.description: The name of the blocked user.

blockedAvatar.description: The avatar of the blocked user.

/users/{userId}/blocked/{blockedId}.description: Blocked accounts for a specific user.
